items.title: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
items.dek: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making bets on conflicts.

items.title: Denver wins in 2OT, gets Wisc. in Frozen Four final
items.dek: In a double-overtime classic, Denver's Kent Anderson scored the winning goal to stun Michigan 4-3 and send the Pioneers to Saturday's Frozen Four title game aga
items.body: In a double-overtime classic, Denver's Kent Anderson scored the winning goal to stun Michigan 4-3 and send the Pioneers to Saturday's Frozen Four title game against Wisconsin.
items.author: IriLine Desk
